since_last: 25% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 25% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.84% · BTC -2.52% · Gold -2.43% · Nasdaq100 -0.85%. 25% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.02%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.02%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.28%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.28%, BIDU +4.42%, AVGO +4.24%, ANET +4.18%, AMBA +3.19%. Laggards: CRNC -5.53%, UPST -5.26%, PANW -4.94%, INTC -4.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.72% at $148.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.72% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
